**🗳 Decentralized Secure Online Voting System**
## 🌍 ICP World Computer Hacker League (WHCL) — Regional Round Finalist | Global Rank 268


> A blockchain-powered secure digital voting platform designed to ensure transparency, tamper resistance, and multi-layer identity verification in online elections.


---

---

# 🌍 Competition Overview

ICP World Computer Hacker League (WHCL) is a global-level blockchain competition conducted by **Internet Computer Protocol (ICP)**.

Our team successfully progressed through the following stages:

        ✅ Qualification Round  

        ✅ National Round  

        ✅ Regional Round (Top 30% selection at each stage)  


We achieved **Global Rank 268 in the Regional Round.**



---

**👨‍💼 Role**
### Team Leader

Responsible for:

        • System architecture design  

        • Blockchain logic implementation  

        • Security model planning  

        • Coordination of authentication, verification, and voting modules  

        • Technical leadership during competition development  



---

**🧠 Problem Statement**

Digital voting systems face several critical challenges.

        • Identity fraud  

        • Vote tampering  

        • Lack of transparency  

        • Coercion during voting  

        • Centralized database manipulation  


Existing systems often lack **layered security and verifiable audit trails.**



---

**🚀 Solution**

We developed a **multi-role decentralized voting platform** secured using custom blockchain logic.

The system included:


🏛 **Admin Panel**  
        -> Election creation and candidate configuration  


🧾 **Inspector Panel**  
        -> Voter registration and ID assignment  


🗳 **Secure Voter Interface**  
        -> Verified voting interaction  


📊 **Authenticated Result Portal**  
        -> Transparent result validation  



---

**🔐 Security Architecture**


### Multi-Layer Identity Verification

        • Valid unique ID entry  

        • Face recognition verification  

        • Random gesture validation  

        • 20-second secure voting window  



### Threat Monitoring

        • Microphone-based audio monitoring for coercion detection  

        • Automatic vote blocking upon anomaly detection  

        • Admin notification system  



### Blockchain Integration

        • Custom blockchain ledger for vote immutability  

        • Tamper-resistant vote storage  

        • Transparent result validation  



---

**🛠 Tech Stack**

        • Custom blockchain architecture  

        • Face recognition module  

        • Gesture recognition logic  

        • Secure role-based access control  

        • Web-based interface  

        • Cryptographic security principles  



---

**🏗 System Architecture**

The platform operates through a layered security model.

        1️⃣ Identity Verification Layer  

        2️⃣ Security & Monitoring Layer  

        3️⃣ Blockchain Recording Layer  

        4️⃣ Admin & Result Validation Layer  


Each vote is **validated, encrypted, and permanently recorded to the blockchain ledger.**



---

**🎯 Key Outcomes**

        • Successfully demonstrated a working decentralized election model  

        • Implemented multi-layer security within hackathon constraints  

        • Designed scalable blockchain voting logic  

        • Advanced through three global competition stages

        • Leading technical development under competitive pressure  

        • Applying blockchain principles in real-world governance use cases
